response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience on Windows platforms, with no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle expertise. While they have extensive software development experience in other languages (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, Java), their domain expertise is not aligned with capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income systems. Their background in web/mobile/embedded systems does not directly translate to the financial systems domain.
strengths: Strong software engineering principles and practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Experience with low-latency applications and high-performance systems
Demonstrated ability to work across multiple domains and technologies
concerns: No professional C++ development experience on Windows platforms
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income systems
No experience with SQL Server or Oracle databases
